name: Effect
desc: Plays a sound or particle effect at a position (e.g., record player, zombie breaking door, guardian curse).

fields.name: volumeModifier
fields.desc: Whether to use a large sound radius

notes: Many effect IDs: 1010=record 2256 now 2256, 2000-particles, 1000-random, 1004-fire, 1005=music disk. Data depends on effect — e.g., for records it's the record item ID.

implementation.overview: World effect (record, particles, sound). Modules: ESP, SoundLocator.
